purpose: 2D pixel-map game prototype source registry for South Korea map overlays.
downloadStatus: Visible overlays no longer use Overpass API files. Roads, highway rest areas, rivers, railways, populated places, peaks, and landuse-derived field patches use non-Overpass OSM-derived exports or services. Province boundaries use SGIS because a compact non-Overpass OSM admin-boundary export was not available in the current source set.

sources.name: SGIS province boundary GeoJSON via statgarten
sources.use: Current province boundary and land fill source.

sources.name: Natural Earth Admin 0 Countries 1:10m
sources.use: Country land background for South Korea and North Korea, used to avoid sea fill north of the DMZ while retaining SGIS province boundaries on top.

sources.name: South Korea: Populated Places, OpenStreetMap Export
sources.use: Current city and town point source.
sources.constraint: OSM data is ODbL. Keep attribution and license obligations.

sources.name: South Korea: Railways, OpenStreetMap Export
sources.use: Current rail, subway, and light-rail path source.
sources.constraint: OSM data is ODbL. Keep attribution and license obligations.

sources.name: ArcGIS OSM Asia Highways FeatureServer
sources.use: Current major expressway and national-road path source. Query is limited to Korea bbox, OSM highway motorway/trunk/primary, and numbered route refs; build output keeps expressways and national route numbers 1-99.
sources.constraint: OSM data is ODbL. Keep attribution and license obligations.

sources.name: ArcGIS OSM Asia POIs FeatureServer highway services/rest_area query
sources.use: Current highway rest area marker source. Build output keeps named service-area POIs near expressway geometry.
sources.constraint: OSM data is ODbL. Keep attribution and license obligations.

sources.name: ArcGIS OSM Asia Waterways FeatureServer
sources.use: Current major river path source. Rendering width uses OSM width tags when available, then named-river and merged-length estimates for stylized display.
sources.constraint: OSM data is ODbL. Keep attribution and license obligations.

sources.name: ArcGIS OSM Asia POIs FeatureServer peak query
sources.use: Current mountain peak icons and mountain-range ridge bands.
sources.constraint: OSM data is ODbL. Keep attribution and license obligations.

sources.name: ArcGIS OSM Asia POIs FeatureServer island/islet query
sources.type: public OSM-derived GeoJSON query with curated coordinate fallbacks
sources.use: Current major island labels including Ulleungdo and Dokdo.
sources.constraint: OSM data is ODbL. Keep attribution and license obligations.

sources.name: ArcGIS OSM Asia POIs FeatureServer national park queries
sources.type: public OSM-derived GeoJSON query with curated coordinate fallbacks
sources.use: Current national park markers and approximate display patches.
sources.constraint: OSM data is ODbL. Keep attribution and license obligations.

sources.name: ArcGIS OSM Asia Landuse FeatureServer field queries
sources.use: Current farmland, meadow, grass, orchard, vineyard, and farmyard density patches.
sources.constraint: OSM data is ODbL. Keep attribution and license obligations.

prototypeDataset.coordinateSystem: Downloaded vectors are transformed and simplified into base canvas pixel coordinates by tools/build-real-overlays.js.
prototypeDataset.accuracy: Road, highway rest area, river, railway, populated-place, peak, and landuse overlays are aligned to OSM-derived coordinates. Province boundaries are SGIS-based and may have minor source-to-source differences from OSM transport and natural features. Country land background is Natural Earth Admin 0 and is drawn below the SGIS province layer.
